{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/log/bolete/line.png
|block_health=8
|tool=[[Axe]] or [[Sickle]]
|rotation=log
}}

== Obtaining ==
Bolete stems can be obtained from giant bolete, which only appear in giant bolete caves.

== Usage ==
Bolete stems can be crafted into 2 [[Bolete Branch|bolete branches]].

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Logs]]
